title: Implement I6 delegation non-escalation in ExecutionGate
intent: Enforce governance invariant I6: when agent a_i delegates execution of capability c to agent a_j, the gate must verify c is in C_eff(S, a_j). Delegation must not expand capability. This requires introducing a delegation graph G, per-agent effective capability sets, and a delegation check in the gate's decision path.
acceptance_criteria: ExecutionGate accepts delegation requests where target agent has the capability
ExecutionGate denies delegation requests where target agent lacks the capability
Delegation graph is represented as a queryable data structure
Decision log entries include delegation context (delegator, target) when applicable
Property tests prove I6 holds: for all (a_i → a_j) in G, delegated capability must be in C_eff(S, a_j)
Kernel boundary rule preserved — no new node:fs/node:net imports in kernel
